message:
Close rust_proxy-8fy: health check target configuration complete

- Added HealthCheckTarget enum with CONNECT and GET variants
- Implemented parse/validation for "CONNECT host:port" and "GET url" formats
- Added serialization/deserialization support
- Added health_check_target setting to Settings struct with default
- Added diff tracking for config changes
- Included 13 unit tests for all functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
